cnbc.title: Meta stock drops on quarterly results as 'internet disruptions' in Iran drag down user numbers
cnbc.summary: Meta beat on revenue, but showed disappointing user numbers and its capital expenditures were below estimates.

cnbc.title: Microsoft calls for $190 billion in 2026 capital spending on soaring memory prices
cnbc.summary: Microsoft's forecast on revenue and operating margin was light, but the company sees $190 billion in 2026 capital spending, well above Wall Street's estimate.

cnbc.title: Alphabet ups 2026 capex to as much as $190 billion, expects to 'significantly increase' in 2027
cnbc.summary: Alphabet reported first-quarter earnings, posting booming cloud revenue and upping its full-year capex spend to as much as $190 billion.

cnbc.title: Brent oil tops $118 after Trump says he will blockade Iran until it agrees to a nuclear deal
cnbc.summary: The latest move higher comes amid reports that the U.S. will look to extend its blockade of Iranian ports.

cnbc.title: Ford raises 2026 guidance as $1.3 billion tariff refund assists in offsetting higher costs
cnbc.summary: Aside from earnings and any changes to the automaker's 2026 guidance, investors will be monitoring effects from the Iran war, tariffs and the pullback in EVs.

cnbc.title: Amazon earnings beat expectations with strong cloud growth
cnbc.summary: Revenue in Amazon's cloud computing segment expanded 28% year over year, topping analysts' estimates.

cnbc.title: Chipotle posts surprise same-store sales growth in early sign chain could be breaking its slump
cnbc.summary: Chipotle shares have plummeted 35% over the last year.

cnbc.title: Warsh hints at a new reading of the Fed's power over swap lines amid UAE discussion
cnbc.summary: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh responded to Senate Banking about swap lines by saying the Fed isn't fully independent in matters of international finance.

cnbc.title: Jerome Powell says he will continue to serve as a Fed governor, calls Trump criticism 'unprecedented'
cnbc.summary: Powell addressed the question of whether he will stay on as a Board of Governors member after his term as chair ends.

cnbc.title: Fed holds rates steady but with highest level of dissent since 1992
cnbc.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its latest decision on interest rates.
